Bash(STITCH_API_KEY="AQ.Ab8RN6Jk-OJtZlYW6dKRkzPns5F6ijAO6nzc3DIR9_sdEhJMpg" npx -y @_davideast/stitch-mcp tool list_projects 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for p in data.get\('projects', []\):
    name = p.get\('name',''\)
    title = p.get\('title',''\)
    screens = len\(p.get\('screenInstances', []\)\)
    created = p.get\('createTime',''\)[:10]
    print\(f'{name} | {title} | {screens} screens | {created}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(STITCH_API_KEY="AQ.Ab8RN6Jk-OJtZlYW6dKRkzPns5F6ijAO6nzc3DIR9_sdEhJMpg" npx -y @_davideast/stitch-mcp tool list_screens -d '{"projectId":"6180425003809710453"}' -o json 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
screens = data if isinstance\(data, list\) else data.get\('screens', data.get\('screenInstances', []\)\)
if isinstance\(data, dict\) and 'screens' not in data and 'screenInstances' not in data:
    # try to find screens in nested structure
    for k,v in data.items\(\):
        if isinstance\(v, list\):
            screens = v
            break
for s in screens[:10]:
    sid = s.get\('id', s.get\('name',''\)\)
    title = s.get\('title','\(sem título\)'\)
    print\(f'{sid} | {title}'\)
" 2>&1)
